case_title: CITY HOUSING INC VS. QURAN SWISHER et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWISHER, QURAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 459 TURK ST. #225, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY HOUSING INC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY WITH ACCRUED COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT SWISHER, QURAN
